author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Sevenfold Puja - Unchecked
content:
SEVEN FOLD PUJA SEMINAR

CONTENTS

Introduction:
Source and basis of puja
Worship
Setting the scene fpr devotion  Beauty
Ceremonial dress
Offerings:
Incense
Food and drink
Light, colour
Chanting, music
Vandana
Significance of Vandana
Modes of salutation
Going for Refuge
Hinayana and Mahayana path
Difference between the Five and Ten precepts
Innovations
Confession of Faults
"heaping"
Fear and recognition of evil
Making a confession
How to recieve a confession
Group values and guilt, revolutionaries
Rejoicing in Merit
Guilt and ability to rejoice in merits
Keeping in touch with feelings;
repression of emotion
Group and individual,children
Re: Towns and country
Precariousness of civilization and spiritual
community
Entreaty and Supplication
Receptivity
Madness;delusions,psycopaths, 'illness'
"Asking the Buddha to stay alive" ?
"Crazy wisdom"
Transference of Merit and Selfsurrender
Bodhicitta and personal property
Supportiveness
General discussion
"objectivity of Buddhahood" in explaining puja
Puja as condensation of whole spiritual life
Mantras
Time of day for puja
